patch.value: Code task for external Issue1 net-new scope: update create log-seed validation, add regression coverage, and sync command/documentation contracts.

patch.value: Ambiguous unquoted key-like continuations are rejected with guidance and no silent text truncation occurs.
Implemented deterministic create log-seed key validation to reject ambiguous unquoted continuations and preserve safe quoted/markdown/stdin flows.
Behavior now rejects unsupported parsed keys for --comment/--note/--learning while quoted, markdown, and stdin paths pass with updated tests/docs.

message: Record resolution evidence fields before close.

value.author: codex-agent
value.text: Implemented create log-seed ambiguity guard in src/cli/commands/create.ts: --comment/--note/--learning now reject parsed unsupported keys to prevent silent text truncation (example text=hello,scope:project), while quoted/markdown/stdin flows remain supported. Added regressions in tests/unit/create-command.spec.ts for comment/note/learning ambiguous seeds, quoted+markdown happy paths, and plural-key branch coverage. Updated docs/contracts: README.md, PRD.md, docs/ARCHITECTURE.md, AGENTS.md, CHANGELOG.md. Verification evidence: node scripts/run-tests.mjs test -- tests/unit/create-command.spec.ts tests/unit/parse-utils.spec.ts (46 passed); node scripts/run-tests.mjs test (71 files, 830 tests passed); node scripts/run-tests.mjs coverage (71 files, 830 tests passed, global branches 91.01% threshold met); pm health --json status ok; pm validate --check-files --scan-mode tracked-all --json and --include-pm-internals --json reproduced expected warning-only audit baselines; pm test pm-l5tr --run --progress --json passed both linked commands.
